actionUnits.condition: Unity EventTrigger (guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building9 has m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick). Its persistent call targets MonoBehaviour fileID=1647098181 (guid ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e), which is the Government script attached to Building9. On click, it should invoke Government.showlabel(), which sets Player->child[1]'s TextMeshPro text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20). For Building9 this resolves to the first 20 chars of 'Government:Police Department'. Ensure a GameObject named 'Player' exists with a child at index 1 containing a TextMeshPro component.

EventTrigger (guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building9 has m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick). Persistent call targets MonoBehaviour id 1647098181 (guid ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e), the Government script attached to Building9, invoking showlabel(). Expected: sets Player child[1] TextMeshPro text to first 20 chars of 'Government:Police Department'.
